content.text:
Excellent! Now I have a clear view of all the neighbor atoms connected to C:31. From the final rotated view, I can confirm all four covalent bonds of the carbon atom.

## Results:

**Neighbour atoms of atom index 31 (C):**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 30 | N (Nitrogen) |
| 34 | C (Carbon) |
| 32 | H (Hydrogen) |
| 36 | H (Hydrogen) |

**Geomconf_index:** 1270

The carbon atom at index 31 has a tetrahedral geometry with four covalent bonds connecting to:
- N:30 (blue nitrogen atom)
- C:34 (yellow carbon atom)  
- H:32 (white hydrogen atom)
- H:36 (white hydrogen atom)

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 31, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
